filePath.label: File Path
filePath.desc: Absolute path of the file to read

refreshInterval.label: Refresh Interval (ms)
refreshInterval.desc: How often to re-read the file. Minimum 100 ms (0.1 s).

fontFamily.label: Font Family
fontFamily.desc: Font family name (leave empty to use the bar default)

maxWidth.label: Max Width (chars)
maxWidth.desc: Maximum string length in characters. Text longer than this will scroll. Set to 0 for no limit.
